mapper.insert: insert into audit_vector_search_log (request_id, workflow_code, task_id, query_count, permission_mode, scope_summary, retrieval_config, result_count, top_resource_ids, status, error_code, error_msg, cost_ms, create_by, create_time) values (#{requestId}, #{workflowCode}, #{taskId}, #{queryCount}, #{permissionMode}, #{scopeSummary}, #{retrievalConfig}, #{resultCount}, #{topResourceIds}, #{status}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMsg}, #{costMs}, #{createBy}, now())
